chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.34 of 2022 Province of Sindh Versus Muhammad Aslam Siddiqui AND H.C.A. No.35 of 2022 Board of Revenue Versus M/s Associated Builder Pvt. Ltd. Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecution of appeals as office objections not complied with since 03.01.2022 Dated: 06.11.2023 None present. -.-.- These matters are coming up for non-prosecution since last few dates. For the first time when it was fixed on 02.03.2022 two weeks’ time was granted for complying with the office objections. Yet again, as an indulgence, on 26.05.2022 time was granted for complying the office objections. Today, being third date, matter is again fixed for non- prosecution as compliance has not been made. Even no one is in attendance on behalf of the appellants and there is no intimation either. Instant High Court Appeals as such are dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge
